title: iResearch - 2026 China AI Market Trend Report
content:
2026 China AI Market Trend Report Summary

Market Size:
- 2025 China AI market reached RMB 425 billion (approximately $4,250 hundred-million yuan)
- 2026 forecast: RMB 568 billion (5,680 hundred-million yuan), YoY growth 33.6%
- Expected to exceed RMB 1 trillion by 2028

Key Trends:
1. Accelerated LLM commercialization: Enterprise LLM adoption grew 120%, concentrated in customer service, marketing, and code generation
2. AI Agents as new growth driver: AI Agent market expected to reach RMB 38 billion in 2026
3. Rapid development of multimodal AI: Text-image and audio-video multimodal applications grew 85% YoY
4. Increased edge AI deployment: On-device AI chip shipments grew 60%

Competitive Landscape:
- Baidu, Alibaba, Tencent, and Huawei hold 65% market share
- Active startup funding: Total AI sector funding reached RMB 120 billion in 2025

title: Gartner 2026 AI Hype Cycle
content:
Gartner 2026 AI Technology Maturity Curve Key Points:

Technologies entering production maturity:
- Conversational AI
- ML Platforms
- Computer Vision

Technologies at the peak of inflated expectations:
- AI Agent
- Multimodal LLMs
- AI Code Generation

Technologies in the trough of disillusionment:
- Autonomous Driving L4+
- Artificial General Intelligence (AGI)

Key Predictions:
- By 2027, 40% of enterprise applications will integrate AI Agent capabilities
- By 2028, 75% of software engineers will use AI coding assistants daily
- AI governance and security will be a key enterprise investment focus in 2026-2027

Gartner recommends: Enterprises should prioritize AI Agent and multimodal AI investments while monitoring AI governance risks.

title: McKinsey - AI Impact Analysis by Industry
content:
McKinsey 2026 AI Industry Impact Report Summary:

AI Adoption Rate by Industry:
- Financial services: 72% (highest)
- Technology: 68%
- Healthcare: 45%
- Manufacturing: 38%
- Retail: 52%

ROI Analysis:
- Average AI investment-to-return ratio: 1:3.5 (every $1 invested generates $3.5 in value)
- Financial industry AI ROI is the highest at 1:5.2
- Highest value use cases: Customer service automation (35% cost savings), Sales forecasting (28% accuracy improvement)

Talent Gap:
- Global AI talent gap: 4 million
- China AI talent gap: approximately 750,000 (75 wan)
- Most scarce roles: AI Architect, MLOps Engineer, AI Product Manager

Investment Recommendation: Prioritize customer service and sales AI scenarios; ROI visible within 6-12 months.
